$comment: The environments this repo deploys — the single source of truth for the release flow. This Action reads only `branch` (to resolve the environment) and `tagSuffix` (stamped on the derived tag); `name`/`isPublicFace`/`noindex` are consumed by the application, not the flow. Adding, removing, or changing an environment is a one-row edit here — nothing else in the release tooling changes. Two entries sharing a tagSuffix is allowed but warned (their tags become indistinguishable); a push to a branch not listed here is rejected by the derivation and short-circuited by resolve-env.
